description: PRD-004 — Corrigir rotas quebradas de gamificação e criar controllers faltantes

userStories.title: Criar LeaderboardController no namespace V1/Gamification
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the LeaderboardController in the correct namespace so the existing routes in api.php stop returning 500 errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Create App\Http\Controllers\Api\V1\Gamification\LeaderboardController
Implement weekly() method — returns weekly ranking using existing RankingController or LeaderboardController logic
Implement monthly() method — returns monthly ranking
Implement alltime() method — returns all-time ranking
Implement friends() method — returns empty array placeholder (social module not yet built)
All methods use Cache::remember with 5min TTL
Routes GET /v1/gamification/leaderboard/* return 200 with valid JSON
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Existing logic in LeaderboardController (root namespace) and RankingController can be reused. Branch from dev.

userStories.title: Criar AchievementController no namespace V1/Gamification
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the list of all achievements and my unlock status.
acceptanceCriteria: Create App\Http\Controllers\Api\V1\Gamification\AchievementController
Implement index() method — returns all achievements with user's unlock status (locked/unlocked + unlocked_at)
Use Achievement and UserAchievement models
Route GET /v1/gamification/achievements returns 200 with valid JSON array
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Achievement and UserAchievement models already exist.

userStories.title: Criar XpHistoryController no namespace V1/Gamification
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my XP transaction history.
acceptanceCriteria: Create App\Http\Controllers\Api\V1\Gamification\XpHistoryController
Implement index() method — returns paginated XP transactions for authenticated user
Include: amount, type, description, created_at in response
Support pagination (cursor or offset)
Route GET /v1/gamification/xp-history returns 200 with valid JSON
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Criar PublicProfileController no namespace V1/PublicProfile
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view other users' public profiles, achievements, and goals by username.
acceptanceCriteria: Create App\Http\Controllers\Api\V1\PublicProfile\PublicProfileController
Implement show(User $username) — returns public profile data (name, username, bio, avatar, level, xp, streak)
Implement achievements(User $username) — returns user's unlocked achievements
Implement goals(User $username) — returns user's public goals only
All routes under /v1/users/{username}/* return 200 with valid JSON
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Route model binding for 'username' already configured in api.php.

userStories.title: Criar endpoint de dashboard de gamificação
userStories.description: As a user, I want a consolidated gamification dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Add GET /v1/gamification/dashboard route in api.php
Response includes: level (current, name), xp (current, next_level, progress %), streak (current, max), daily_limits, recent badges
Uses GamificationService and UserGamification model
Returns 200 with valid JSON
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: GamificationService has all the logic needed.
